strategic_profile.executive_summary: The University of South Carolina is a flagship, R1 public research university known for its elite #1-ranked International Business program and highly praised first-year student experience. It offers a vibrant urban campus life with strong Greek presence and robust research funding.
strategic_profile.market_position: State Flagship / Major Public Research University
strategic_profile.admissions_philosophy: Holistic with a strong emphasis on core GPA, academic rigor, and capacity limits of intended majors.

analyst_takeaways.insight: Acceptance rates have dropped from nearly 69% in 2019 to 60.2% in 2024, reflecting an increasingly competitive applicant pool.
analyst_takeaways.implication: USC is transitioning from a reliable safety school to a solid target/reach for out-of-state students, especially in competitive majors.

analyst_takeaways.insight: Internal transfer to the Darla Moore School of Business requires a 3.25 GPA and Calculus, while Nursing requires a 3.50 GPA and allows only one grade below C in science courses.
analyst_takeaways.implication: Students applying undeclared or attempting to switch into impacted majors face significant academic hurdles and 'weeder' courses.

analyst_takeaways.insight: High-achieving out-of-state students can receive Stamps, McNair, or Horseshoe Scholars awards, which reduce tuition to the in-state rate and offer up to $225,000 in 4-year value.
analyst_takeaways.implication: USC offers tremendous ROI for elite out-of-state applicants willing to compete for its top scholar programs.

campus_dynamics.social_environment: Vibrant and spirited environment heavily influenced by SEC athletics and a prominent Greek Village system.
campus_dynamics.transportation_impact: Urban campus supported by the 'Carolina Cab' program, offering free student rides within a 5-mile radius.
campus_dynamics.research_impact: Classified as an R1 institution, generating over $309 million in annual sponsored research awards.

current_status.test_policy_details: Test-optional. Standardized test scores are considered if submitted, but primary emphasis is placed on GPA and rigor of secondary school record.

longitudinal_trends.notes: Waitlist admission saw a notable spike in 2024 compared to previous virtually zero-admit years.
Highly volatile waitlist cycle with only 15 students admitted.

gpa.notes: GPA represents average high school core GPA of enrolled students.

testing.policy_note: 33% of students submitted SAT scores; roughly 17% submitted ACT scores.

colleges.name: Darla Moore School of Business
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: Ideal for high-achieving applicants seeking top-tier supply chain or international business programs.

majors.name: International Business
majors.special_requirements: Internal transfers must have 15+ credits, a 3.25 GPA, and a C or better in Calculus.
majors.notes: Ranked #1 undergraduate International Business program for 27 consecutive years.

colleges.name: College of Nursing
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: For highly dedicated pre-health students; extreme competition for upper-division clinical placement.

majors.name: Nursing
majors.special_requirements: Requires interview for upper-division progression. Only one grade below C allowed in science/nursing courses.
majors.notes: Upper division admits only 270-300 students per cycle. Average competitive progression GPA is 3.6 - 3.8.

colleges.name: McCausland College of Arts and Sciences
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: Good for undecided applicants or those pursuing liberal arts, sciences, or seeking a gateway into the university.

majors.name: Undeclared
majors.special_requirements: Students have an Undeclared Academic Advisor and pay a $250/semester enrichment fee.
majors.notes: Undeclared students lose Academic Common Market (ACM) tuition benefits while without a major.

application_deadlines.notes: Recommended deadline to ensure consideration for general university merit-based scholarships.

supplemental_requirements.target_program: South Carolina Honors College / Top Scholars
supplemental_requirements.details: A separate Honors College application supplement must be completed.

holistic_factors.specific_differentiators: South Carolina residents graduating in the top 10% of their high school class are guaranteed admission.

major_selection_tactics: If applicants are borderline for highly selective programs like Business or Nursing, applying 'Undeclared' in the College of Arts & Sciences serves as an entry point.
List a less impacted second-choice major, as USC reviews applications for alternate majors if space in the first choice is full.
application_strategy.alternate_major_strategy: USC formally considers an applicant's second-choice major if they are not admitted to their primary major. Admissions explicitly advises students to utilize this option for maximum consideration.

scholarships.name: Stamps Scholars Award
scholarships.benefits: Includes an additional $15,000 enrichment fund. Estimated four-year value of $225,000.

scholarships.name: McNair Scholars Award
scholarships.benefits: Includes a $12,000 enrichment fund. Estimated four-year value of over $198,000.

scholarships.name: Horseshoe Scholars Award
scholarships.benefits: Estimated four-year value of more than $142,000.

scholarships.name: Alumni Scholars Award
scholarships.benefits: Four-year value over $130,000. Requires Honors College application.

ap_policy.general_rule: Scores of 3 or higher generally receive credit.
exceptions: Some STEM and foreign language tests may require a 4 or 5 for optimal placement.
ap_policy.usage: Used for course credit and advanced standing.

ib_policy.general_rule: Scores of 4-7 on Higher Level (HL) exams receive credit.

transfer_articulation.restrictions: A maximum of 30 semester hours of non-traditional credit may be applied. The last 25% of degree requirements must be completed in residence.

what_it_takes: Rigorous high school curriculum without a significant drop in senior year grades.
Strong standardized test scores (if applying test-optional, a highly competitive GPA is required).
Strategic major alignment to balance ambition with college capacity limits.
red_flags: Applying to Darla Moore or Nursing without top-tier STEM/Calculus readiness.
insights: Students praise the 'University 101' program as a cornerstone of adapting to college.
The Honors College is highly acclaimed for offering elite liberal arts intimacy within a massive state school.
